titleStmt.title: SII 10.547: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 547. (A.R. No. 340 of 1915.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF NṚISIṀHASVĀMI, NEKARIKALLU, NARASARAOPETA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1254 (Śrīmukha)

summary.p: Refers to the gift of eighty puṭṭis of land to god Śānta-Narasiṁha of Nagarakallu and states that one Siṅgavibhu formed a village on that land and called it Nārasiṁhyapuram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīnārīsahituṁ ḍai śrīnarasiṁhyuṇḍu tanadu sēvāparulan® śrī
nagarakaṁṭa neppuḍu śrīnilayulaṁ jēsi karuṇaṁ jēkoni kācunu . [1 .*] sadā
nagarakaṁṭīśō nṛsiṁhyō bhaktavatsalaḥ . taraṁgitakṛpādṛṣṭyāḥ pāyā dvō
ssā¨rvvakālikaṁ . svasti śrīśakava¨rṣa savistaraṇaṁ meṭṭi danina vēyiṭamī
ṁda vistāraṁ miṁnnūṟunu prastuti nēṁbadiyu nālgu varaleḍi cō
ṭanu . [2 .*] śrīmukhavaiśākhaśitapakṣapaṁcamī nādivāramuna madhyāṁhna
maṁdu nagarakaṁṭanu śāṁtanarasiṁhyadēvara saṁnidhāya nanaṁtaśaila
munanu jagamulu vrōvaṁ bāṁcālapuraṁbu śrīgōpaḷayya manasu
kō¨rki dī¨rpan® [Aruga] bhūvaru ṇicce nani cellanice buddāṁkuṁ ḍeṁbadi vuṭlu
polamu . Adiyu nūrugā sama¨rpiṁceṁ jenukāli siṁgavibhuṁḍu
nārasiṁhyunakunu nārasiṁhyapuramu nalinoppucu nanavēmamahī
ṁdru puṇyavihāra mayye . [3 .*]
Digital edition of SII 10.547 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
